directive_events.owner_directive: Approach A + secondary by-path identity bug in one PR; core-change authorized by owner.
解决一下 codex 的 P1（落盘路径 SaveData.save 的 isinstance 门槛仍会在验证通过后立即拒绝 by-path 同名类型）
directive_events.reason: Codex P1: extend the runtime by-path type-identity fix to the SaveData save path. Validation now accepts same-name types but save's isinstance gates (_unwrap_for_save, _save_collection, _delegate_save_collection) would fail immediately after. Add shared same_registered_type in core/types/base.py; apply logical-type tolerance in savers save-path gates.

docs_events.rationale: No spec change; save_data unresolvable-core_type fallback and runtime same-name type tolerance are internal validation details, not part of a documented contract.
No architectural decision; bugfix aligns runtime type check with the existing static validator and load_data fallback.
Internal bugfix, no user-facing surface change; config_schema core_type default remains DataFrame.
No user-facing behavior doc describes this validation fallback.

owner_directive: Fix save_data validation bug: (A) align get_effective_input_ports fallback to DataObject to match load_data, removing false rejection of non-core registered types during validate_workflow; and (B) fix the secondary by-path type-identity mismatch so runtime port_accepts_type accepts same-registered-name types that static validate_connection already accepts. Approach A + secondary bug in one PR.

scope_events.reason: Include the test files exercising both fixes; they are the required test evidence for this implementation change.
Include the test files exercising both fixes; they are the required test evidence for this implementation change.
